creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Roman from comment #2)
Moin moin 

The empty clock widget stems from a bug in Qt's timezone handling. This should now be solved too, when /etc/localtime is not a symlink by r541830 [1].

Could you make sure, your qt5-core is at 5.15.0_1


mfg Tobias

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=541830
